dashboard.what: Main control center displaying key metrics and performance indicators
dashboard.use: Monitor overall business performance, sales trends, and team activities at a glance
dashboard.benefit: Make data-driven decisions faster with real-time insights and quick access to critical information

dashboard_catalog.what: Collection of 12 enterprise-level reports categorized by Executive, Sales, Customer, Operations, and Financial
dashboard_catalog.use: Access specialized dashboards and reports tailored to different business needs and roles
dashboard_catalog.benefit: Get deeper insights with role-specific analytics and customized reporting views

tasks.what: To do management system to track daily work and priorities
tasks.use: Create, assign, and monitor to do items with due dates, priorities, and progress tracking
tasks.benefit: Stay organized, meet deadlines, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks

tasks_team.what: Consolidated view of all team members' to do items
tasks_team.use: Monitor team workload, progress, and to do distribution across the organization
tasks_team.benefit: Improve team coordination, identify bottlenecks, and balance workload effectively

checkin_history.what: Record of all field visit check-ins with GPS location and timestamps
checkin_history.use: Track sales team's on-site visits, customer meetings, and field activities
checkin_history.benefit: Verify visit completion, analyze travel patterns, and ensure accountability

calendar.use: View and manage all activities, meetings, and appointments
calendar.benefit: Prevent scheduling conflicts and never miss important customer interactions

customers.what: Central database of all customer information and relationships
customers.use: Store and manage customer details, contact information, and business history
customers.benefit: Access complete customer profiles instantly and deliver personalized service

customer_insights.what: Advanced analytics dashboard showing customer behavior and trends
customer_insights.use: Analyze purchase patterns, revenue trends, and customer segmentation
customer_insights.benefit: Identify high-value customers, upsell opportunities, and retention risks

customer_intelligence.what: AI-powered customer intelligence with predictive analytics and recommendations
customer_intelligence.use: Get smart insights about customer preferences, next best actions, and churn prediction
customer_intelligence.benefit: Make proactive decisions and deliver exceptional customer experiences

leads.what: Pipeline of potential customers and new business opportunities
leads.use: Capture, qualify, and convert leads into active customers
leads.benefit: Grow your customer base systematically and track lead-to-customer conversion

deals.what: Active sales opportunities through the entire sales cycle
deals.use: Track deal progress, probability, value, and expected close dates
deals.benefit: Forecast revenue accurately and focus efforts on high-value opportunities

quotations.what: Formal price quotes and service proposals for customers
quotations.use: Create, send, and track quotations with detailed pricing and terms
quotations.benefit: Speed up the sales process and maintain consistent pricing standards

quotations_bulk.what: Bulk quotation creation tool for multiple customers simultaneously
quotations_bulk.use: Generate quotations for multiple customers at once with standardized pricing
quotations_bulk.benefit: Save time on repetitive quotations and ensure pricing consistency

proposals.what: Professional business proposals and tender documents
proposals.use: Create comprehensive proposals with terms, timelines, and case studies
proposals.benefit: Win more deals with professional, persuasive proposal documents

contracts.what: Legal agreements and service contracts with customers
contracts.use: Manage contract lifecycle from creation to renewal and amendments
contracts.benefit: Ensure legal compliance, track contract terms, and automate renewals

approvals.what: Multi-level approval workflows for quotations, deals, and contracts
approvals.use: Submit, review, and approve business documents based on role permissions
approvals.benefit: Maintain control and compliance with structured approval processes

reports.what: Comprehensive reports on sales performance and team productivity
reports.use: Generate and analyze reports on revenue, targets, and KPIs
reports.benefit: Measure performance, identify trends, and make informed strategic decisions

admin_users.what: User account management and access control
admin_users.use: Create, edit, and manage user accounts with role assignments
admin_users.benefit: Control system access and maintain security across the organization

admin_roles.what: Role-based access control with customizable permissions
admin_roles.use: Define roles (Sales Rep, Manager, Admin) and their specific permissions
admin_roles.benefit: Ensure data security with appropriate access levels for each role

admin_business_units.what: Organizational structure for business units and divisions
admin_business_units.use: Define and manage different business units within the company
admin_business_units.benefit: Support multi-business operations with proper data segregation

admin_departments.use: Create and manage departments like Sales, Operations, Finance
admin_departments.benefit: Organize teams effectively and enable department-level reporting

admin_teams.use: Create teams, assign members, and set team leaders
admin_teams.benefit: Facilitate team collaboration and territory management

admin_branches.use: Manage physical locations, branches, and regional offices
admin_branches.benefit: Support multi-location operations and location-based reporting

admin_products.use: Define products, services, pricing, and configurations
admin_products.benefit: Maintain consistent product information and pricing across sales

admin_customer_types.use: Define customer categories like Enterprise, SME, Retail
admin_customer_types.benefit: Enable targeted marketing and segment-specific pricing strategies

admin_lead_sources.what: Lead source tracking and marketing channel management
admin_lead_sources.use: Define and track where leads come from (Website, Referral, Events)
admin_lead_sources.benefit: Measure marketing ROI and optimize lead generation channels

admin_pipeline.what: Sales pipeline stages and workflow configuration
admin_pipeline.use: Customize deal stages, probability settings, and stage requirements
admin_pipeline.benefit: Align CRM workflow with your actual sales process

admin_workflows.what: Automated approval workflows and business rules
admin_workflows.use: Configure multi-step approval processes with conditions and triggers
admin_workflows.benefit: Automate routine processes and ensure governance compliance

admin_data_access.what: Data visibility and access control policies
admin_data_access.use: Define who can see and edit which records based on role and hierarchy
admin_data_access.benefit: Protect sensitive data while enabling collaboration

admin_templates.what: Document templates for quotations, contracts, and emails
admin_templates.use: Create and manage reusable templates with merge fields
admin_templates.benefit: Save time and maintain brand consistency across documents

admin_custom_fields.what: Custom field definitions for extended data capture
admin_custom_fields.use: Add industry-specific fields to customers, deals, or other records
admin_custom_fields.benefit: Customize CRM to match your unique business requirements

admin_tags.what: Tag and label system for flexible categorization
admin_tags.use: Create tags to organize and filter records by custom criteria
admin_tags.benefit: Improve searchability and create flexible groupings

admin_documents.what: Central document repository and file management
admin_documents.use: Store, organize, and manage all business documents and files
admin_documents.benefit: Easy access to important files with version control and security

admin_integrations.what: External system connections and API integrations
admin_integrations.use: Connect with accounting, email, and other business systems
admin_integrations.benefit: Eliminate duplicate data entry and sync information automatically

admin_audit.what: Complete audit trail of all system changes and activities
admin_audit.use: Track who did what and when across the entire system
admin_audit.benefit: Ensure accountability, troubleshoot issues, and meet compliance requirements

admin_settings.use: Configure system-wide settings like currency, timezone, and business rules
admin_settings.benefit: Tailor the CRM to your organization's specific needs

bulk_quotation.title: Custom Quotation Creation
bulk_quotation.description: Create custom quotations by uploading a CSV or Excel file
bulk_quotation.upload_description: Drag and drop or click to select an Excel (.xlsx, .xls) or CSV file
bulk_quotation.upload_tip: Make sure your file follows the template format. Download the template from the Template tab if you haven't already.
bulk_quotation.template_info: Download a pre-formatted template with example data to get started quickly
bulk_quotation.excel_description: Download Excel template with formatting and validation rules
bulk_quotation.csv_description: Download CSV template for basic editing in any spreadsheet software
bulk_quotation.error_amount_invalid: Amount must be a positive number
bulk_quotation.error_validity_invalid: Validity must be a positive number

bulk_quotation.warning_validity_long: Validity period is very long (> 365 days)

contracts.subtitle: Manage and track all contracts
contracts.expire_message: This contract will expire in {days} days ({date}). Consider initiating renewal process.
contracts.expire_message_detail: This contract will expire in 45 days (Jan 31, 2025). Please consider initiating the renewal process.
contracts.contract_summary_text: This Master Service Agreement defines terms and conditions for international air freight services between NexusLogistics and Global Freight Solutions Inc. The agreement covers standard shipping routes, customs clearance, and insurance services for a period of 24 months with monthly billing cycles.

proposals.list_subtitle: Manage and track all proposals and quotations
proposals.try_adjusting_filters: Try adjusting your search or filters
proposals.exec_summary_p1: We are pleased to present this comprehensive logistics solution proposal designed specifically for your organization's growing needs in international freight management.
proposals.exec_summary_p2: SCGJWD LOGISTICS brings over 15 years of experience in providing end-to-end supply chain solutions across Southeast Asia. Our proven track record and state-of-the-art technology platform ensure seamless, efficient, and cost-effective logistics operations.
proposals.terms_2: 2. Payment terms: 30 days net from invoice date
proposals.terms_3: 3. Contract period: 12 months with automatic renewal
proposals.terms_4: 4. Price adjustment: Annual review based on CPI
